database.name: Case and Surgical Logbook
database.intro:
This logbook is used to record patient cases and surgical procedures. Trainees must submit their logbook monthly for mentor review and approval.

Submission Requirements:

  • Submit by the last day of each month
  • Include all cases handled during the month
  • Provide complete procedure details and outcomes
  • Await mentor approval before next month's submission
database.singletemplate:
Case Entry ##id##

Case Date:[[case_date]]
Subspecialty:[[subspecialty]]
Procedure Type:[[procedure_type]]
Procedure Details:[[procedure_details]]
Patient Age:[[patient_age]]
Diagnosis:[[diagnosis]]
Surgical Role:[[surgical_role]]
Outcomes:[[outcomes]]
Complications:[[complications]]
Learning Points:[[learning_points]]
Approval Status:[[approval_status]]
Mentor Feedback:[[mentor_feedback]]
[[edit]] [[delete]] [[approve]]

field.name: case_date
field.description: Date when the case was handled

field.name: subspecialty
field.param1: Cataract Retina Cornea Glaucoma Oculoplasty Pediatric Ophthalmology Neuro-Ophthalmology General Ophthalmology

field.name: surgical_role
field.param1: Primary Surgeon Assistant Surgeon Observer Supervised Practice

field.name: complications
field.description: Any complications encountered (write "None" if no complications)

field.name: learning_points
field.description: Key learning points from this case

field.name: approval_status
field.param1: Pending Review Approved Needs Revision Rejected
